isc.criterion: Exports parseQuery(qs) returning an object of decoded key/value pairs
isc.evidence: src/router/parse-query.ts exports parseQuery returning a record
parse-query.ts assigns raw split parts; no decodeURIComponent anywhere

isc.criterion: Repeated keys are collected into an array
isc.evidence: parse-query.ts: out[k] = v overwrites; never builds an array
no handling of a leading '?'; it becomes part of the first key

isc.criterion: Tests cover decoding, repeated keys, and the leading '?'
isc.evidence: no test file present in the diff

summary: Only the most basic parse works; decoding, repeated keys, '?' stripping, and tests are all missing. Significant gaps.

issues.detail: No URL decoding; values like %20 stay encoded.
